name: Pinto Beans with Ham Hocks
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight in enough cold water to cover by 4 inches. Drain well.
2. Combine beans, ham hocks, onion, salt, pepper, sugar, and garlic in a large saucepot. Cover with water.
3. Bring mixture to boil over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to low and simmer until beans are tender, about 45 minutes.
4. Check seasoning and serve hot.
